contents: (** * Coercions between hom-set adjunctions and unit+counit adjunctions *)
Require Import Basics.Trunc Types.Sigma HoTT.Tactics Equivalences.
(** We need to jump through some hoops with [simpl] for speed *)

Context c d d'
              (f : morphism D (F c) d)
              (g : morphism D d d').

Let adjunction_naturalityT
        := Eval simpl in
            G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f).

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT

hypotheses.body: G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f)

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT

hypotheses.body: G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f)

contents: pose proof (ap10 (commutes A (c, d) (c, d') (1%morphism, g))^ f) as H'; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT

hypotheses.body: G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f)

hypotheses.type: G _1 g o A (c, d) f o 1 = A (c, d') (g o f o F _1 1)

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT

hypotheses.body: G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f)

hypotheses.type: G _1 g o A (c, d) f = A (c, d') (g o f)

contents:
Context c c' d
              (f : morphism D (F c') d)
              (g : morphism C c c').

Let adjunction_naturalityT'
        := Eval simpl in
            A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g).

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT'

hypotheses.body: A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g)

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT'

hypotheses.body: A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g)

contents: pose proof (ap10 (commutes A (c', d) (c, d) (g, 1%morphism))^ f) as H'; simpl in *.

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT'

hypotheses.body: A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g)

hypotheses.type: G _1 1 o A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (1 o f o F _1 g)

goals.conclusion: adjunction_naturalityT'

hypotheses.body: A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g)

hypotheses.type: A (c', d) f o g = A (c, d) (f o F _1 g)

contents:
(**
     Quoting from Awodey's "Category Theory":

     Proposition 9.4. Given categories and functors,

     [F : C ↔ D : G]

     the following conditions are equivalent:

     1. [F] is left adjoint to [G]; that is, there is a natural
        transformation

        [η : 1_C → G ∘ F]

        that has the UMP of the unit:

        For any [c : C], [d : D] and [f : c -> G d] there exists a
        unique [g : F c → d] such that [f = G g ∘ η c].

     2. For any [c : C] and [d : D] there is an isomorphism,

        [ϕ : Hom_D (F c, d) ≅ Hom_C (c, G d)]

        that is natural in both [c] and [d].

     Moreover, the two conditions are related by the formulas

     [ϕ g = G g ∘ η c]

     [η c = ϕ(1_{F c})]
     *)

Lemma adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_hom_helper (A : AdjunctionHom F G)
        (c : C) (d : D) (f : morphism C c (G d))
  : IsHProp {g : morphism D (F c) d & G _1 g o A (c, F c) 1 = f}.

goals.conclusion:
IsHProp
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}

IsHProp
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}

forall
x
 y : {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d &
     G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f},
x = y

contents: intros [g0 H0] [g1 H1]; apply path_sigma_hprop; simpl.

goals.conclusion: g0 = g1

hypotheses.type: G _1 g0 o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f
G _1 g1 o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f

goals.conclusion: g0 = g1

hypotheses.type: G _1 g0 o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = G _1 g1 o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1

goals.conclusion: g0 = g1

hypotheses.type: A (c, d) (g0 o 1) = A (c, d) (g1 o 1)

goals.conclusion: g0 = g1

hypotheses.type: A (c, d) g0 = A (c, d) g1

goals.conclusion: idmap g0 = idmap g1

hypotheses.type: A (c, d) g0 = A (c, d) g1
A (c, d) g0 = A (c, d) g1
A (c, d) g0 = A (c, d) g1

contents:
let k := constr:(ap10 (@left_inverse _ _ _ (A (c, d)) _)) in
    simpl rewrite k.

goals.conclusion: g1 = g1

hypotheses.type: A (c, d) g0 = A (c, d) g1

contents:
Lemma adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_hom__mate_of__commutes
        (A : AdjunctionHom F G) (s d : C) (m : morphism C s d)
  : A (d, F d) 1 o m = G _1 (F _1 m) o A (s, F s) 1.

goals.conclusion: A (d, (F _0 d)%object) 1 o m = G _1 (F _1 m) o A (s, (F _0 s)%object) 1
A (d, (F _0 d)%object) 1 o m = G _1 (F _1 m) o A (s, (F _0 s)%object) 1
A (s, (F _0 d)%object) (1 o F _1 m) = A (s, (F _0 d)%object) (F _1 m o 1)
A (s, (F _0 d)%object) (F _1 m) = A (s, (F _0 d)%object) (F _1 m)

contents:
Definition adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_hom (A : AdjunctionHom F G)
  : AdjunctionUnit F G.

goals.conclusion: AdjunctionUnit F G
AdjunctionUnit F G

contents:
exists (Build_NaturalTransformation
              1 (G o F)
              (fun c => A (c, F c) 1)
              (adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_hom__mate_of__commutes A)).

goals.conclusion:
forall (c : C) (d : D) (f : morphism C c (G _0 d)%object),
Contr
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d &
  G _1 g
  o Build_NaturalTransformation 1 (G o F)
      (fun c0 : C => A (c0, (F _0 c0)%object) 1)
      (adjunction_unit__of__adjunction_hom__mate_of__commutes A) c =
  f}

Contr
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}

IsHProp
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}
{g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}

IsHProp
  {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}
{g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o A (c, (F _0 c)%object) 1 = f}

contents:
exact ((A (c, d))^-1%morphism f;
             ((adjunction_naturality A _ _ _ _ _)
                @ (ap (A (c, d)) (right_identity _ _ _ _))
                @ (ap10 (@right_inverse _ _ _ (A (c, d)) _) f))%path).
(** We want to be able to use this without needing [Funext].  So, first, we prove that the types of hom-sets are equivalent. *)

Lemma equiv_hom_set_adjunction
        (c : C) (d : D)
  : morphism C c (G d) <~> morphism D (F c) d.

goals.conclusion: morphism C c (G _0 d)%object <~> morphism D (F _0 c)%object d
morphism C c (G _0 d)%object <~> morphism D (F _0 c)%object d

contents:
refine (equiv_adjointify
              (fun f => (@center _ (T.2 _ _ f)).1)
              (fun g => G _1 g o T.1 c)
              _ _);
    intro.

goals.conclusion:
(center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = G _1 x o T.1 c}).1 =
x

G _1 (center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = x}).1
o T.1 c = x

(center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = G _1 x o T.1 c}).1 =
x

contents:
match goal with
        | [ |- @pr1 ?A ?P ?x = ?y ]
          => change (x.1 = (exist P y idpath).1)
      end.

goals.conclusion:
(center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = G _1 x o T.1 c}).1 =
(x; 1%path).1

center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = G _1 x o T.1 c} =
(x; 1%path)

G _1 (center {g : morphism D (F _0 c)%object d & G _1 g o T.1 c = x}).1
o T.1 c = x

contents:
match goal with
        | [ |- context[?x.1] ]
          => exact x.2
      end.

Lemma adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit__commutes
        (T : AdjunctionUnit F G)
        sc sd dc dd
        (mc : morphism C dc sc) (md : morphism D sd dd)
  : (fun x : morphism D (F sc) sd => G _1 (md o x o F _1 mc) o T .1 dc) =
    (fun x : morphism D (F sc) sd => G _1 md o (G _1 x o T .1 sc) o mc).

goals.conclusion:
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 sc)%object sd => G _1 (md o x o F _1 mc) o T.1 dc) =
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 sc)%object sd => G _1 md o (G _1 x o T.1 sc) o mc)

(fun x : morphism D (F _0 sc)%object sd => G _1 (md o x o F _1 mc) o T.1 dc) =
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 sc)%object sd => G _1 md o (G _1 x o T.1 sc) o mc)
G _1 (md o x o F _1 mc) o T.1 dc = G _1 md o (G _1 x o T.1 sc) o mc

G _1 md o (G _1 x o (G _1 (F _1 mc) o T.1 dc)) =
G _1 md o (G _1 x o (T.1 sc o mc))

G _1 md o (G _1 x o (G _1 (F _1 mc) o T.1 dc)) =
G _1 md o (G _1 x o (G _1 (F _1 mc) o T.1 dc))

contents:
Definition adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit
             (T : AdjunctionUnit F G)
  : AdjunctionHom F G.

goals.conclusion: AdjunctionHom F G
AdjunctionHom F G

(HomFunctor.hom_functor D o Core.pair (Functor.Dual.opposite F) 1)%functor <~=~>
(HomFunctor.hom_functor C o Core.pair 1 G)%functor

IsIsomorphism
  (Build_NaturalTransformation
     (HomFunctor.hom_functor D o Core.pair (Functor.Dual.opposite F) 1)
     (HomFunctor.hom_functor C o Core.pair 1 G) ?CO 
     ?COM)
forall x : C * D, IsIsomorphism (?CO x)

forall (s d : Prod.prod (Category.Dual.opposite C) D)
(m : morphism (Prod.prod (Category.Dual.opposite C) D) s d),
(fun cd : C * D =>
 equiv_fun (equiv_hom_set_adjunction T (fst cd) (snd cd))^-1) d
o (HomFunctor.hom_functor D o Core.pair (Functor.Dual.opposite F) 1) _1 m =
(HomFunctor.hom_functor C o Core.pair 1 G) _1 m
o (fun cd : C * D =>
   equiv_fun (equiv_hom_set_adjunction T (fst cd) (snd cd))^-1) s

forall (s d : C * D)
(m : morphism C (fst d) (fst s) * morphism D (snd s) (snd d)),
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 (fst s))%object (snd s) =>
 G _1 (snd m o x o F _1 (fst m)) o T.1 (fst d)) =
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 (fst s))%object (snd s) =>
 G _1 (snd m) o (G _1 x o T.1 (fst s)) o fst m)

(fun x : morphism D (F _0 (fst s))%object (snd s) =>
 G _1 (snd m o x o F _1 (fst m)) o T.1 (fst d)) =
(fun x : morphism D (F _0 (fst s))%object (snd s) =>
 G _1 (snd m) o (G _1 x o T.1 (fst s)) o fst m)

hypotheses.type: morphism C (fst d) (fst s) * morphism D (snd s) (snd d)

contents: Definition AdjunctionUnitWithFunext `{Funext} C D F G := @AdjunctionUnit C D F G.
Definition AdjunctionCounitWithFunext `{Funext} C D F G := @AdjunctionCounit C D F G.
Definition AdjunctionUnitCounitWithFunext `{Funext} C D F G := @AdjunctionUnitCounit C D F G.

Definition adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit_Funext `{Funext} C D F G
           (A : AdjunctionUnitWithFunext _ _)
: AdjunctionHom _ _
  := @adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit _ C D F G A.

Definition AdjunctionHomOfAdjunctionCounit_Funext `{Funext} C D F G
           (A : AdjunctionCounitWithFunext _ _)
: AdjunctionHom _ _
  := @adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit _ C D F G (adjunction_unit_counit__of__adjunction_counit A).

Definition adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unitCounit_Funext `{Funext} C D F G
           (A : AdjunctionUnitCounitWithFunext _ _)
: AdjunctionHom _ _
  := @adjunction_hom__of__adjunction_unit _ C D F G A.
